requirements.title: Limit system access to authorized users
requirements.description: Limit system access to authorized users, processes acting on behalf of authorized users, and devices.

requirements.title: Limit system access to permitted functions
requirements.description: Limit system access to the types of transactions and functions that authorized users are permitted to execute.

requirements.title: Control the flow of CUI
requirements.description: Control the flow of CUI in accordance with approved authorizations.
requirements.note: Requires Microsoft Purview information protection labels and DLP policies; not exposed through Graph v1.0.

requirements.title: Separate duties of individuals
requirements.description: Separate the duties of individuals to reduce the risk of malevolent activity without collusion.
requirements.note: Partial: we count role concentration. Formal duty separation is a policy/process judgment call.

requirements.title: Employ least privilege
requirements.description: Employ the principle of least privilege, including for specific security functions and privileged accounts.

requirements.title: Use non-privileged accounts for non-security functions
requirements.description: Use non-privileged accounts or roles when accessing non-security functions.
requirements.note: Signal inferred from PIM activation patterns; user-behavior verification still manual.

requirements.title: Prevent non-privileged execution of privileged functions
requirements.description: Prevent non-privileged users from executing privileged functions and capture the execution of such functions in audit logs.

requirements.title: Limit unsuccessful logon attempts
requirements.description: Limit unsuccessful logon attempts.
requirements.note: Not measured. Ticket #4 (AC-7 failed-auth analysis) will close this via /auditLogs/signIns.

requirements.title: Provide privacy and security notices
requirements.description: Provide privacy and security notices consistent with applicable CUI rules.
requirements.note: Requires verifying sign-in banner/terms of use policy content; outside the collector's scope.

requirements.title: Session lock with pattern-hiding displays
requirements.description: Use session lock with pattern-hiding displays to prevent access and viewing of data after a period of inactivity.
requirements.note: Depends on endpoint OS configuration (Intune config profile). Ticket #7 (Intune config profiles) will cover this.

requirements.title: Terminate user sessions after defined condition
requirements.description: Terminate (automatically) a user session after a defined condition.
requirements.note: Depends on CA sign-in frequency and token lifetime policies; not currently parsed from CA policies.

requirements.title: Monitor and control remote access
requirements.description: Monitor and control remote access sessions.
requirements.note: Partial: enforced CA policies are the primary remote-access gate.

requirements.title: Cryptographic mechanisms for remote access
requirements.description: Employ cryptographic mechanisms to protect the confidentiality of remote access sessions.
requirements.note: Microsoft 365 uses TLS by default; verification requires confirming no legacy protocols are enabled (Exchange, SharePoint).

requirements.title: Route remote access via managed access control points
requirements.description: Route remote access via managed access control points.
requirements.note: Partial: CA enforces Entra as the managed control point.

requirements.title: Authorize remote execution of privileged commands
requirements.description: Authorize remote execution of privileged commands and remote access to security-relevant information.
requirements.note: Partial: PIM activation provides authorization signal.

requirements.title: Authorize wireless access
requirements.description: Authorize wireless access prior to allowing such connections.
requirements.note: Wireless authorization is an infrastructure control (802.1X, RADIUS) not visible to Graph.

requirements.title: Protect wireless access with authentication and encryption
requirements.description: Protect wireless access using authentication and encryption.
requirements.note: Infrastructure control; not visible to Graph. Policy-only via MP-1.

requirements.title: Control mobile device connection
requirements.description: Control connection of mobile devices.
requirements.note: Intune MDM controls this; mobile compliance policies exist but the OS filter excludes mobile today. Ticket #8 (multi-OS filter) will expose this.

requirements.title: Encrypt CUI on mobile devices
requirements.description: Encrypt CUI on mobile devices and mobile computing platforms.
requirements.note: Mobile compliance policies enforce this via Intune; see ticket #8.

requirements.title: Verify and control connections to external systems
requirements.description: Verify and control/limit connections to and use of external systems.
requirements.note: External sharing in SharePoint/OneDrive. Ticket #6 (external sharing posture) will cover this.

requirements.title: Limit portable storage devices on external systems
requirements.description: Limit use of organizational portable storage devices on external systems.
requirements.note: Intune device restriction profiles; covered when ticket #7 (Intune config profiles) lands.

requirements.title: Control CUI on publicly accessible systems
requirements.description: Control CUI posted or processed on publicly accessible systems.
requirements.note: Requires content classification (Purview labels) and publishing-site governance; not in Graph.

requirements.title: User security awareness
requirements.description: Ensure that managers, systems administrators, and users of organizational systems are made aware of the security risks associated with their activities.
requirements.note: Covered via awareness training policy document only; actual completion tracking not collected.

requirements.title: Personnel training on assigned duties
requirements.description: Ensure that personnel are trained to carry out their assigned information security-related duties and responsibilities.
requirements.note: Policy doc only; completion tracking would require Attack Simulation Training integration.

requirements.title: Insider threat awareness training
requirements.description: Provide security awareness training on recognizing and reporting potential indicators of insider threat.
requirements.note: Policy doc only.

requirements.title: Create and retain system audit logs
requirements.description: Create and retain system audit logs and records to enable monitoring, analysis, investigation, and reporting of unlawful or unauthorized system activity.

requirements.title: Trace actions of individual users
requirements.description: Ensure that the actions of individual system users can be uniquely traced.

requirements.title: Review and update logged events
requirements.description: Review and update logged events.
requirements.note: Partial: review cadence is a documented process, not an automatable signal.

requirements.title: Alert on audit logging process failure
requirements.description: Alert in the event of an audit logging process failure.
requirements.note: Requires Sentinel or Log Analytics alert configuration; not visible to Graph.

requirements.title: Correlate audit review, analysis, and reporting
requirements.description: Correlate audit record review, analysis, and reporting processes.
requirements.note: Policy-level; tool surfaces data for review.

requirements.title: Audit record reduction and report generation
requirements.description: Provide audit record reduction and report generation to support on-demand analysis.
requirements.note: Graph audit APIs support on-demand query; report generation is manual.

requirements.title: System clock synchronization
requirements.description: Provide a system capability that compares and synchronizes internal system clocks.
requirements.note: Microsoft 365 tenants sync to Microsoft time service by default; not an inspectable signal.

requirements.title: Protect audit information
requirements.description: Protect audit information and audit logging tools from unauthorized access, modification, and deletion.
requirements.note: Entra unified audit log is immutable by platform design; verification requires attestation.

requirements.title: Limit audit management
requirements.description: Limit management of audit logging functionality to a subset of privileged users.
requirements.note: Partial: privileged role scope is visible; audit-specific scoping requires PIM role review.

requirements.title: Baseline configurations and inventories
requirements.description: Establish and maintain baseline configurations and inventories of organizational systems throughout the respective system development life cycles.
requirements.note: Policy doc only. Ticket #7 (Intune config profiles) will add baseline-enforcement evidence.

requirements.title: Security configuration settings
requirements.description: Establish and enforce security configuration settings for information technology products employed in organizational systems.
requirements.note: Intune configuration profiles; ticket #7 will close this.

requirements.title: Track and approve changes
requirements.description: Track, review, approve or disapprove, and log changes to organizational systems.
requirements.note: Change management process; not observable via Graph.

requirements.title: Security impact analysis of changes
requirements.description: Analyze the security impact of changes prior to implementation.
requirements.note: Process control; requires CCB documentation.

requirements.title: Access restrictions for changes
requirements.description: Define, document, approve, and enforce physical and logical access restrictions associated with changes to organizational systems.
requirements.note: Policy/process control.

requirements.title: Least functionality
requirements.description: Employ the principle of least functionality by configuring organizational systems to provide only essential capabilities.
requirements.note: Intune configuration profiles; ticket #7 will cover disabled-feature enforcement.

requirements.title: Restrict nonessential programs and services
requirements.description: Restrict, disable, or prevent the use of nonessential programs, functions, ports, protocols, and services.
requirements.note: Endpoint configuration via Intune; ticket #7.

requirements.title: Application allowlisting / denylisting
requirements.description: Apply deny-by-exception (blacklisting) policy to prevent the use of unauthorized software or deny-all, permit-by-exception (whitelisting) policy to allow the execution of authorized software.
requirements.note: Intune app protection / Endpoint Security policies; ticket #7.

requirements.title: Control user-installed software
requirements.description: Control and monitor user-installed software.
requirements.note: Intune app protection and compliance; ticket #7 + ticket #8 together.

requirements.title: Identify users, processes, and devices
requirements.description: Identify system users, processes acting on behalf of users, and devices.

requirements.title: Authenticate identities
requirements.description: Authenticate (or verify) the identities of users, processes, or devices, as a prerequisite to allowing access to organizational systems.

requirements.title: MFA for privileged and network access
requirements.description: Use multifactor authentication for local and network access to privileged accounts and for network access to non-privileged accounts.

requirements.title: Replay-resistant authentication
requirements.description: Employ replay-resistant authentication mechanisms for network access to privileged and non-privileged accounts.
requirements.note: Entra's default auth protocols (OAuth 2.0 / OpenID Connect) are replay-resistant. Verification is architectural.

requirements.title: Prevent reuse of identifiers
requirements.description: Prevent reuse of identifiers for a defined period.
requirements.note: Partial: UPN uniqueness verifiable; deletion retention is Entra platform default.

requirements.title: Disable identifiers after inactivity
requirements.description: Disable identifiers after a defined period of inactivity.

requirements.title: Password complexity
requirements.description: Enforce a minimum password complexity and change of characters when new passwords are created.

requirements.title: Prohibit password reuse
requirements.description: Prohibit password reuse for a specified number of generations.
requirements.note: Entra enforces a platform default of 24-generation history.

requirements.title: Temporary password use
requirements.description: Allow temporary password use for system logons with an immediate change to a permanent password.
requirements.note: Entra supports temporary access passes; feature use is not currently inspected.

requirements.title: Cryptographically-protected passwords
requirements.description: Store and transmit only cryptographically-protected passwords.
requirements.note: Entra platform default; no user-facing control.

requirements.title: Obscure authentication feedback
requirements.description: Obscure feedback of authentication information.
requirements.note: Entra platform default; no user-facing control.

requirements.title: Incident-handling capability
requirements.description: Establish an operational incident-handling capability for organizational systems that includes preparation, detection, analysis, containment, recovery, and user response activities.

requirements.title: Track, document, and report incidents
requirements.description: Track, document, and report incidents to designated officials and/or authorities both internal and external to the organization.
requirements.note: Partial: tooling signal (Defender alerts); reporting process requires documentation.

requirements.title: Test incident response capability
requirements.description: Test the organizational incident response capability.
requirements.note: Tabletop-exercise evidence is external to the tenant; tracked via IR-1 policy doc.

requirements.title: Perform system maintenance
requirements.description: Perform maintenance on organizational systems.
requirements.note: Policy doc only.

requirements.title: Control maintenance tools and personnel
requirements.description: Provide controls on the tools, techniques, mechanisms, and personnel used to conduct system maintenance.
requirements.note: Policy doc only.

requirements.title: Sanitize equipment before off-site maintenance
requirements.description: Ensure equipment removed for off-site maintenance is sanitized of any CUI.
requirements.note: Physical process; not observable.

requirements.title: Check media for malicious code
requirements.description: Check media containing diagnostic and test programs for malicious code before the media are used in organizational systems.
requirements.note: Endpoint AV scan policy; SI-3 partially signals this.

requirements.title: MFA for nonlocal maintenance
requirements.description: Require multifactor authentication to establish nonlocal maintenance sessions via external network connections and terminate such connections when nonlocal maintenance is complete.
requirements.note: Partial: overall MFA enforcement is visible; maintenance-specific scope is policy-level.

requirements.title: Supervise unauthorized maintenance personnel
requirements.description: Supervise the maintenance activities of maintenance personnel without required access authorization.
requirements.note: Physical process; not observable.

requirements.title: Protect system media containing CUI
requirements.description: Protect (i.e., physically control and securely store) system media containing CUI, both paper and digital.
requirements.note: Policy doc only.

requirements.title: Limit access to CUI media
requirements.description: Limit access to CUI on system media to authorized users.
requirements.note: Policy doc only; file-level ACLs require Purview labels to observe.

requirements.title: Sanitize or destroy media before disposal
requirements.description: Sanitize or destroy system media containing CUI before disposal or release for reuse.
requirements.note: Physical process; not observable.

requirements.title: Mark media with CUI markings
requirements.description: Mark media with necessary CUI markings and distribution limitations.
requirements.note: Requires Purview sensitivity labels with marking.

requirements.title: Control access during media transport
requirements.description: Control access to media containing CUI and maintain accountability for media during transport outside of controlled areas.
requirements.note: Physical process.

requirements.title: Encrypt CUI on digital media in transport
requirements.description: Implement cryptographic mechanisms to protect the confidentiality of CUI stored on digital media during transport unless otherwise protected by alternative physical safeguards.
requirements.note: Intune FileVault / BitLocker policies required; ticket #7.

requirements.title: Control removable media use
requirements.description: Control the use of removable media on system components.
requirements.note: Intune device restriction profiles; ticket #7.

requirements.title: Prohibit unowned portable storage
requirements.description: Prohibit the use of portable storage devices when such devices have no identifiable owner.
requirements.note: Policy-level control; enforcement via Intune profiles.

requirements.title: Protect backup CUI
requirements.description: Protect the confidentiality of backup CUI at storage locations.
requirements.note: M365 backups are Microsoft-operated with encryption at rest; customer-managed backups require separate inspection.

requirements.title: Screen personnel before access
requirements.description: Screen individuals prior to authorizing access to organizational systems containing CUI.
requirements.note: Policy doc only.

requirements.title: Protect systems during personnel actions
requirements.description: Ensure that organizational systems containing CUI are protected during and after personnel actions such as terminations and transfers.
requirements.note: AC-2 flags stale accounts; full offboarding process is policy/procedure.

requirements.title: Limit physical access
requirements.description: Limit physical access to organizational systems, equipment, and the respective operating environments to authorized individuals.
requirements.note: Policy doc only.

requirements.title: Protect and monitor physical facility
requirements.description: Protect and monitor the physical facility and support infrastructure for organizational systems.
requirements.note: Policy doc only.

requirements.title: Escort visitors
requirements.description: Escort visitors and monitor visitor activity.
requirements.note: Physical process.

requirements.title: Maintain audit logs of physical access
requirements.description: Maintain audit logs of physical access.
requirements.note: Physical access control system; not observable via Graph.

requirements.title: Control physical access devices
requirements.description: Control and manage physical access devices.
requirements.note: Physical process.

requirements.title: Safeguarding at alternate work sites
requirements.description: Enforce safeguarding measures for CUI at alternate work sites.
requirements.note: Policy-level; enforcement via MDM and CA conditional-access.

requirements.title: Periodic risk assessments
requirements.description: Periodically assess the risk to organizational operations, organizational assets, and individuals, resulting from the operation of organizational systems and the associated processing, storage, or transmission of CUI.
requirements.note: Policy doc only; assessment reports are external artifacts.

requirements.title: Scan for vulnerabilities
requirements.description: Scan for vulnerabilities in organizational systems and applications periodically and when new vulnerabilities affecting those systems and applications are identified.
requirements.note: Defender for Endpoint TVM; requires the Defender API (see Defender vulns warning).

requirements.title: Remediate vulnerabilities per risk assessment
requirements.description: Remediate vulnerabilities in accordance with risk assessments.
requirements.note: Intune compliance / update status partial signal; full vuln tracking needs Defender TVM.

requirements.title: Periodic control assessments
requirements.description: Periodically assess the security controls in organizational systems to determine if the controls are effective in their application.
requirements.note: This tool *is* one such assessment; results are not (yet) persisted historically. Ticket #9 (history) will provide evidence.

requirements.title: Plans of action (POA&M)
requirements.description: Develop and implement plans of action designed to correct deficiencies and reduce or eliminate vulnerabilities in organizational systems.
requirements.note: Remediation backlog in this tool is analogous but not an OSCAL POA&M. Out of current scope.

requirements.title: Continuous monitoring
requirements.description: Monitor security controls on an ongoing basis to ensure the continued effectiveness of the controls.
requirements.note: Ticket #10 (scheduled runs + alerts) enables this operationally.

requirements.title: System security plan (SSP)
requirements.description: Develop, document, and periodically update system security plans that describe system boundaries, system environments of operation, how security requirements are implemented, and the relationships with or connections to other systems.
requirements.note: SSP is an external document; not generated by this tool.

requirements.title: Monitor and control boundary communications
requirements.description: Monitor, control, and protect communications at the external boundaries and key internal boundaries of organizational systems.

requirements.title: Architectural designs for information security
requirements.description: Employ architectural designs, software development techniques, and systems engineering principles that promote effective information security within organizational systems.
requirements.note: Policy doc only.

requirements.title: Separate user and system management functions
requirements.description: Separate user functionality from system management functionality.
requirements.note: Partial: admin/user role separation visible; functional isolation is architectural.

requirements.title: Prevent unauthorized transfer via shared resources
requirements.description: Prevent unauthorized and unintended information transfer via shared system resources.
requirements.note: Microsoft 365 tenant isolation is Microsoft-operated; attestation-based.

requirements.title: Subnetworks for publicly accessible components
requirements.description: Implement subnetworks for publicly accessible system components that are physically or logically separated from internal networks.
requirements.note: N/A for pure SaaS tenants; architectural for hybrid deployments.

requirements.title: Deny network traffic by default
requirements.description: Deny network communications traffic by default and allow network communications traffic by exception.
requirements.note: Partial: CA policies with block grant control observable; network-layer firewall is separate.

requirements.title: Prevent split tunneling
requirements.description: Prevent remote devices from simultaneously establishing non-remote connections with organizational systems and communicating via some other connection to resources in external networks.
requirements.note: VPN / endpoint policy; ticket #7 (Intune config profiles) will surface if configured.

requirements.title: Encrypt CUI in transit
requirements.description: Implement cryptographic mechanisms to prevent unauthorized disclosure of CUI during transmission unless otherwise protected by alternative physical safeguards.
requirements.note: Microsoft 365 uses TLS 1.2+ by default; verification requires confirming no legacy protocols enabled. Ticket #5 (email security) partially covers.

requirements.title: Terminate sessions after inactivity
requirements.description: Terminate network connections associated with communications sessions at the end of the sessions or after a defined period of inactivity.
requirements.note: CA sign-in frequency and session controls; not currently parsed from CA policies.

requirements.title: Manage cryptographic keys
requirements.description: Establish and manage cryptographic keys for cryptography employed in organizational systems.
requirements.note: Microsoft-managed keys for M365; customer-managed via Customer Key is separate.

requirements.title: FIPS-validated cryptography
requirements.description: Employ FIPS-validated cryptography when used to protect the confidentiality of CUI.
requirements.note: GCC-High uses FIPS 140-2 validated modules by platform design; attestation-based.

requirements.title: Prohibit remote collaborative computing activation
requirements.description: Prohibit remote activation of collaborative computing devices and provide indication of devices in use to users present at the device.
requirements.note: Teams / camera-access policies on the endpoint; ticket #7.

requirements.title: Control mobile code
requirements.description: Control and monitor the use of mobile code.
requirements.note: Browser security policies; endpoint Intune config.

requirements.title: Control VoIP
requirements.description: Control and monitor the use of Voice over Internet Protocol (VoIP) technologies.
requirements.note: Teams governance; separate scope.

requirements.title: Protect communications session authenticity
requirements.description: Protect the authenticity of communications sessions.
requirements.note: TLS is platform default; attestation-based.

requirements.title: Protect CUI at rest
requirements.description: Protect the confidentiality of CUI at rest.
requirements.note: M365 default encryption-at-rest; Purview labels provide CUI-specific protection. Ticket #7 (FileVault/BitLocker via Intune) also contributes.

requirements.title: Identify and correct system flaws
requirements.description: Identify, report, and correct system flaws in a timely manner.
requirements.note: Partial: Intune compliance signals patch state; Defender TVM required for full signal.

requirements.title: Malicious code protection
requirements.description: Provide protection from malicious code at designated locations within organizational systems.

requirements.title: Monitor security alerts and advisories
requirements.description: Monitor system security alerts and advisories and take action in response.
requirements.note: Defender alert count visible; response workflow is process-level.

requirements.title: Update malicious code protection
requirements.description: Update malicious code protection mechanisms when new releases are available.
requirements.note: Intune managedDevices antivirus definition status.

requirements.title: Periodic and real-time scans
requirements.description: Perform periodic scans of organizational systems and real-time scans of files from external sources as files are downloaded, opened, or executed.
requirements.note: Defender real-time protection status via Intune.

requirements.title: Monitor traffic for attacks
requirements.description: Monitor organizational systems, including inbound and outbound communications traffic, to detect attacks and indicators of potential attacks.
requirements.note: Defender alerts are the observable signal.

requirements.title: Identify unauthorized use
requirements.description: Identify unauthorized use of organizational systems.
requirements.note: Requires sign-in log analysis + risky-sign-in detection. Ticket #4 (AC-7 failed auth) + P2 licensing unlocks this.
